name: Creative AI Wiki
description: A source-backed LLM wiki for studying how generative AI changes creative production across music, image, video, film, advertising, and game content.

impact_lenses.label: Workflow Impact
impact_lenses.description: How generative AI changes creative pipelines from research to distribution.

impact_lenses.label: Copyright & Licensing
impact_lenses.description: How training data, outputs, likeness, style, and licensing affect rights.

impact_lenses.label: Creator Labor
impact_lenses.description: How AI tools reshape creative work, skills, roles, and bargaining power.

impact_lenses.label: Market & Platform
impact_lenses.description: How model providers, platforms, studios, and tool vendors capture value.

impact_lenses.label: Ethics & Authenticity
impact_lenses.description: How consent, disclosure, synthetic media, bias, and trust should be handled.
